---
title: "Configuration"
description: "Core configuration values for DraftStack projects."
---

<!-- Generated by DraftStack. Edit the blueprint or regenerate the site to change this file. -->

Set the documentation repository, docs branch, docs path prefix, monitored repositories, confidence threshold, skip rules, and style guides.

The self-docs workflow uses `pat-baseten/draftstack-docs` as the documentation repository and `pat-baseten/draftstack` as the monitored repository.
